title: Biochemical Measures of Neuropathy - DHE
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"ebqg7","text":"Summary:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"81tjq","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3vvmv","text":"Oxidative stress is highly correlated with the metabolic changes caused by hyperglycemia. Increased levels of glucose overload mitochondria and result in the production of reactive oxygen species (ROS). In addition, the flow of excess glucose through cellular pathways decreases the cell’s normal ability to detoxify ROS. As a result, the neurons and axons of the peripheral nervous system contain increased levels of ROS and decreased antioxidant capacity. The following assays are used to measure these changes in rodent models of diabetic neuropathy. HBSS (pH 7.4): Combine HEPES, NaCl, KCl, MgCl², and CaCl². pH to 7.4 then filter to sterilize. (may
be stored at 22ºC for several months)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":1,"length":14},{"style":"sub","offset":46,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":57,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"71ilj","text":"
DHE: Dissolve 1 vial in 100 μL DMSO (10 mg/mL). Remove 10 μL, aliquot and freeze remainder. Protect from light and discard after thawing 3 times. Add the 10 μL to 1mL HBSS (0.1 mg/mL), then for the working dilution put 100 μL of diluted solution into 10 mL HBSS. steps: Open Fluoroskan and choose open under the file menu. Scroll down and select DHE.sed. Set up your plate layout. Save your layout as DHxxxxxx.sed with xxxxxx being yy/mm/dd.
*Treat cells per experimental paradigm. Note: *As an alternative, cells can be pre-loaded with DHE- do steps 3, 4, 5, 2, then 5.
15 minutes prior to reading, gently rinse cells once with HBSS.
Apply 3 μΜDHE in HBSS and leave on for 15 minutes.
Place plate into Fluroskan holder and click START .
Take readings using 485 nm ex, 612 nm em filter pairs for ethidium and 355 nm ex, 430 nm em for DHE.

Save both sheets with .xls extension into the DHE data folder or your own folder. Use the naming convention DH XXXX.xls, where XXXX is the date in mmdd format and add a r for the red reading and b for the blue reading.
creator: Lili Liang
